# @vlting/ui — Full Reference

> Cross-platform design system built on Tamagui v2. Multi-brand theming, tree-shakeable imports. Web + React Native.

## Install

```
npm install @vlting/ui
```

## Provider Setup

Every app must wrap content in `<Provider>` with a brand config:

```tsx
import { Provider, createBrandConfig, defaultBrand } from '@vlting/ui'

const config = createBrandConfig(defaultBrand)

function App() {
  return <Provider config={config}>{children}</Provider>
}
```

Built-in brands: `defaultBrand` (YInMn Blue), `shadcnBrand` (neutral), `funBrand` (vibrant), `poshBrand` (luxe)

---

## PRIMITIVES (Layer 1)

### Box
Generic container. Like `div` but cross-platform.
```tsx
import { Box } from '@vlting/ui'
<Box padding="$4" backgroundColor="$min" borderRadius="$4">
  {children}
</Box>
<Box centered>{children}</Box>  // centers content
```

### Stack / VStack / HStack
Layout containers with direction and gap.
```tsx
import { VStack, HStack } from '@vlting/ui'
<VStack gap="$4">{children}</VStack>       // vertical
<HStack gap="$2" alignItems="center">{children}</HStack>  // horizontal
```

### Text
Body text element.
```tsx
import { Text } from '@vlting/ui'
<Text color="$neutral12" fontSize="$3">Hello</Text>
<Text color="$colorSubtitle">Secondary text</Text>
```

### Heading
Section headings. Uses font weight alternation (H1 heavy, H2 light, H3 heavy...).
```tsx
import { Heading } from '@vlting/ui'
<Heading level={1}>Page Title</Heading>
<Heading level={3}>Section</Heading>
```

### Icon
Icon wrapper. Use with Remix Icons.
```tsx
import { Icon } from '@vlting/ui'
import { RiHomeLine } from '@vlting/ui/icons'
<Icon icon={RiHomeLine} size={20} color="$neutral12" />
```

### Badge
Status indicators, counts, labels.
```tsx
import { Badge } from '@vlting/ui'
<Badge variant="default">New</Badge>
<Badge variant="destructive" tone="danger">Error</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline" size="sm">v1.2</Badge>
```
Variants: `default` | `solid` | `secondary` | `destructive` | `outline` | `subtle`
Tones: `neutral` | `primary` | `success` | `warning` | `danger`
Sizes: `sm` | `md` | `lg`

### Label
Form label element.
```tsx
import { Label } from '@vlting/ui'
<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
```

### Divider / Separator
Visual divider line.
```tsx
import { Divider } from '@vlting/ui'
<Divider />                         // horizontal
<Divider orientation="vertical" />  // vertical
```

### Spacer
Flexible space between items.
```tsx
<HStack>
  <Text>Left</Text>
  <Spacer />
  <Text>Right</Text>
</HStack>
```

### Skeleton
Content placeholder during loading.
```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@vlting/ui'
<Skeleton width={200} height={20} />
<Skeleton width="100%" height={40} borderRadius="$4" />
```

### Spinner
Inline loading indicator.
```tsx
import { Spinner } from '@vlting/ui'
<Spinner size="sm" />
<Spinner size="lg" color="$neutral12" />
```

### AspectRatio
Maintain aspect ratio for children.
```tsx
import { AspectRatio } from '@vlting/ui'
<AspectRatio ratio={16/9}><img src="..." /></AspectRatio>
```

### Kbd
Keyboard shortcut display.
```tsx
import { Kbd } from '@vlting/ui'
<Kbd>⌘K</Kbd>
```

### VisuallyHidden
Screen-reader-only content.
```tsx
import { VisuallyHidden } from '@vlting/ui'
<VisuallyHidden>Close dialog</VisuallyHidden>
```

### Portal
Render children in a portal (outside DOM tree).
```tsx
import { Portal } from '@vlting/ui'
<Portal>{overlay}</Portal>
```

---

## COMPONENTS (Layer 2)

### Button
```tsx
import { Button } from '@vlting/ui'

<Button variant="default" size="md">Click</Button>
<Button variant="destructive" size="sm">Delete</Button>
<Button variant="outline" loading>Saving...</Button>
<Button variant="ghost" size="icon">
  <Button.Icon><RiCloseLine /></Button.Icon>
</Button>
<Button tone="primary">
  <Button.Icon><RiAddLine /></Button.Icon>
  <Button.Text>Add Item</Button.Text>
</Button>
```
Variants: `default` | `solid` | `secondary` | `destructive` | `outline` | `ghost` | `link`
Sizes: `xs` | `sm` | `md` | `lg` | `icon`
Tones: `neutral` | `primary` | `success` | `warning` | `danger`

### Input
```tsx
import { Input } from '@vlting/ui'
<Input placeholder="Email" value={value} onChangeText={setValue} />
<Input type="password" />
<Input disabled />
```

### InputGroup
Input with prefix/suffix elements.
```tsx
import { InputGroup } from '@vlting/ui'
<InputGroup.Root>
  <InputGroup.Addon>https://</InputGroup.Addon>
  <InputGroup.Input placeholder="example.com" />
</InputGroup.Root>

<InputGroup.Root>
  <InputGroup.Element><RiSearchLine /></InputGroup.Element>
  <InputGroup.Input placeholder="Search..." />
</InputGroup.Root>
```

### Textarea
```tsx
import { Textarea } from '@vlting/ui'
<Textarea placeholder="Message" rows={4} value={text} onChangeText={setText} />
```

### Card
```tsx
import { Card } from '@vlting/ui'
<Card>
  <Card.Header>
    <Card.Title>Title</Card.Title>
    <Card.Description>Description</Card.Description>
  </Card.Header>
  <Card.Content>{body}</Card.Content>
  <Card.Footer>{actions}</Card.Footer>
</Card>
```

### Dialog
```tsx
import { Dialog, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger><Button>Open</Button></Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Title>Edit Profile</Dialog.Title>
    <Dialog.Description>Make changes here.</Dialog.Description>
    {form}
    <Dialog.Close><Button variant="ghost">Cancel</Button></Dialog.Close>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>
```

### AlertDialog
For confirmation dialogs (destructive actions).
```tsx
import { AlertDialog, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<AlertDialog.Root>
  <AlertDialog.Trigger><Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button></AlertDialog.Trigger>
  <AlertDialog.Content>
    <AlertDialog.Title>Are you sure?</AlertDialog.Title>
    <AlertDialog.Description>This cannot be undone.</AlertDialog.Description>
    <AlertDialog.Cancel><Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button></AlertDialog.Cancel>
    <AlertDialog.Action><Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button></AlertDialog.Action>
  </AlertDialog.Content>
</AlertDialog.Root>
```

### Sheet
Side panel overlay.
```tsx
import { Sheet, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<Sheet.Root>
  <Sheet.Trigger><Button>Open</Button></Sheet.Trigger>
  <Sheet.Content side="right">
    <Sheet.Header>
      <Sheet.Title>Settings</Sheet.Title>
    </Sheet.Header>
    {content}
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>
```

### Drawer
Bottom panel (mobile-friendly, swipe-to-dismiss).
```tsx
import { Drawer, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<Drawer.Root>
  <Drawer.Trigger><Button>Open</Button></Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content>
    <Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Title>Options</Drawer.Title>
    </Drawer.Header>
    {content}
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer.Root>
```

### Select
```tsx
import { Select } from '@vlting/ui'
<Select.Root value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <Select.Trigger>
    <Select.Value placeholder="Choose..." />
  </Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Group>
      <Select.Label>Fruits</Select.Label>
      <Select.Item value="apple">Apple</Select.Item>
      <Select.Item value="banana">Banana</Select.Item>
    </Select.Group>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>
```

### Combobox
Searchable select.
```tsx
import { Combobox } from '@vlting/ui'
<Combobox.Root value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <Combobox.Input placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
  <Combobox.Content>
    <Combobox.Item value="react">React</Combobox.Item>
    <Combobox.Item value="vue">Vue</Combobox.Item>
    <Combobox.Item value="svelte">Svelte</Combobox.Item>
  </Combobox.Content>
</Combobox.Root>
```

### Checkbox
```tsx
import { Checkbox, Label, HStack } from '@vlting/ui'
<HStack gap="$2" alignItems="center">
  <Checkbox.Root id="terms" checked={checked} onCheckedChange={setChecked}>
    <Checkbox.Indicator />
  </Checkbox.Root>
  <Label htmlFor="terms">Accept terms</Label>
</HStack>
```

### Switch
```tsx
import { Switch, Label, HStack } from '@vlting/ui'
<HStack gap="$2" alignItems="center">
  <Label htmlFor="notifications">Notifications</Label>
  <Switch id="notifications" checked={on} onCheckedChange={setOn} />
</HStack>
```

### RadioGroup
```tsx
import { RadioGroup, Label } from '@vlting/ui'
<RadioGroup.Root value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <HStack gap="$2" alignItems="center">
    <RadioGroup.Item value="a" id="a" />
    <Label htmlFor="a">Option A</Label>
  </HStack>
  <HStack gap="$2" alignItems="center">
    <RadioGroup.Item value="b" id="b" />
    <Label htmlFor="b">Option B</Label>
  </HStack>
</RadioGroup.Root>
```

### Slider
```tsx
import { Slider } from '@vlting/ui'
<Slider value={[50]} onValueChange={setValue} min={0} max={100} step={1} />
```

### Toggle / ToggleGroup
```tsx
import { Toggle, ToggleGroup } from '@vlting/ui'

// Single toggle
<Toggle pressed={bold} onPressedChange={setBold}>B</Toggle>

// Group (single selection)
<ToggleGroup type="single" value={view} onValueChange={setView}>
  <ToggleGroup.Item value="grid">Grid</ToggleGroup.Item>
  <ToggleGroup.Item value="list">List</ToggleGroup.Item>
</ToggleGroup>
```

### Tabs
```tsx
import { Tabs } from '@vlting/ui'
<Tabs.Root defaultValue="account">
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="account">Account</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="password">Password</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  <Tabs.Content value="account">{accountContent}</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="password">{passwordContent}</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs.Root>
```

### Accordion
```tsx
import { Accordion } from '@vlting/ui'
<Accordion.Root type="single" collapsible>
  <Accordion.Item value="faq-1">
    <Accordion.Trigger>What is @vlting/ui?</Accordion.Trigger>
    <Accordion.Content>A cross-platform design system.</Accordion.Content>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion.Root>
```

### Collapsible
```tsx
import { Collapsible, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<Collapsible.Root>
  <Collapsible.Trigger><Button variant="ghost">Toggle</Button></Collapsible.Trigger>
  <Collapsible.Content>{content}</Collapsible.Content>
</Collapsible.Root>
```

### Table
```tsx
import { Table } from '@vlting/ui'
<Table.Root>
  <Table.Header>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Head>Name</Table.Head>
      <Table.Head>Email</Table.Head>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Header>
  <Table.Body>
    <Table.Row>
      <Table.Cell>Alice</Table.Cell>
      <Table.Cell>alice@example.com</Table.Cell>
    </Table.Row>
  </Table.Body>
</Table.Root>
```

### DataTable
Interactive table with sorting, filtering, pagination.
```tsx
import { DataTable } from '@vlting/ui'
import type { ColumnDef } from '@vlting/ui'

const columns: ColumnDef<User>[] = [
  { accessorKey: 'name', header: 'Name' },
  { accessorKey: 'email', header: 'Email' },
  { accessorKey: 'role', header: 'Role' },
]

<DataTable columns={columns} data={users} />
```

### Form + Field
```tsx
import { Form, Field, Input, Button } from '@vlting/ui'

<Form.Root onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
  <Form.Field error={errors.email}>
    <Form.Label htmlFor="email">Email</Form.Label>
    <Input id="email" value={email} onChangeText={setEmail} />
    <Form.Description>Your work email</Form.Description>
    <Form.ErrorMessage>{errors.email}</Form.ErrorMessage>
  </Form.Field>
  <Button type="submit">Submit</Button>
</Form.Root>

// Standalone Field (without Form)
<Field.Root>
  <Field.Label>Name</Field.Label>
  <Field.Control><Input /></Field.Control>
  <Field.Description>Your display name</Field.Description>
  <Field.Error>Required</Field.Error>
</Field.Root>
```

### Alert
```tsx
import { Alert } from '@vlting/ui'
<Alert variant="default">
  <Alert.Title>Heads up!</Alert.Title>
  <Alert.Description>Something to note.</Alert.Description>
</Alert>
<Alert variant="destructive">
  <Alert.Title>Error</Alert.Title>
  <Alert.Description>Something went wrong.</Alert.Description>
</Alert>
```

### Toast
```tsx
// Imperative API (recommended)
import { toast, ImperativeToastViewport } from '@vlting/ui'

// In layout:
<ImperativeToastViewport />

// In handlers:
toast('Saved!')
toast.success('Profile updated')
toast.error('Failed to save')
toast.promise(saveFn(), {
  loading: 'Saving...',
  success: 'Done!',
  error: 'Error',
})
```

### Tooltip
```tsx
import { Tooltip, TooltipProvider, Button } from '@vlting/ui'

// Wrap app in TooltipProvider
<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip content="Save changes">
    <Button variant="icon"><RiSaveLine /></Button>
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

### Popover
```tsx
import { Popover, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger><Button>Settings</Button></Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>
    {settingsForm}
  </Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>
```

### HoverCard
```tsx
import { HoverCard } from '@vlting/ui'
<HoverCard.Root>
  <HoverCard.Trigger><a href="/user">@username</a></HoverCard.Trigger>
  <HoverCard.Content>
    {userProfile}
  </HoverCard.Content>
</HoverCard.Root>
```

### DropdownMenu
```tsx
import { DropdownMenu, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<DropdownMenu.Root>
  <DropdownMenu.Trigger><Button variant="ghost">⋯</Button></DropdownMenu.Trigger>
  <DropdownMenu.Content>
    <DropdownMenu.Item onSelect={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownMenu.Item>
    <DropdownMenu.Item onSelect={handleDuplicate}>Duplicate</DropdownMenu.Item>
    <DropdownMenu.Separator />
    <DropdownMenu.Item onSelect={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownMenu.Item>
  </DropdownMenu.Content>
</DropdownMenu.Root>
```

### ContextMenu
Right-click menu (web only).
```tsx
import { ContextMenu } from '@vlting/ui'
<ContextMenu.Root>
  <ContextMenu.Trigger>{content}</ContextMenu.Trigger>
  <ContextMenu.Content>
    <ContextMenu.Item>Copy</ContextMenu.Item>
    <ContextMenu.Item>Paste</ContextMenu.Item>
  </ContextMenu.Content>
</ContextMenu.Root>
```

### Command
Command palette / searchable list.
```tsx
import { Command } from '@vlting/ui'
<Command.Root>
  <Command.Input placeholder="Type a command..." />
  <Command.List>
    <Command.Group heading="Suggestions">
      <Command.Item onSelect={handleCalendar}>Calendar</Command.Item>
      <Command.Item onSelect={handleSearch}>Search</Command.Item>
    </Command.Group>
    <Command.Separator />
    <Command.Empty>No results found.</Command.Empty>
  </Command.List>
</Command.Root>
```

### Calendar
Inline date picker.
```tsx
import { Calendar } from '@vlting/ui'
<Calendar.Root selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />
```

### DatePicker
Date selection in a popup.
```tsx
import { DatePicker } from '@vlting/ui'
<DatePicker value={date} onChange={setDate} placeholder="Pick a date" />
```

### DateRangePicker
```tsx
import { DateRangePicker } from '@vlting/ui'
<DateRangePicker
  value={{ from: startDate, to: endDate }}
  onChange={setRange}
  placeholder="Select range"
/>
```

### Avatar
```tsx
import { Avatar } from '@vlting/ui'
<Avatar src="/photo.jpg" alt="User" fallback="JD" size="md" />
```

### Progress
```tsx
import { Progress } from '@vlting/ui'
<Progress value={75} max={100} />
```

### Breadcrumb
```tsx
import { Breadcrumb } from '@vlting/ui'
<Breadcrumb items={[
  { label: 'Home', href: '/' },
  { label: 'Products', href: '/products' },
  { label: 'Widget', active: true },
]} />
```

### Pagination
```tsx
import { Pagination } from '@vlting/ui'
<Pagination page={currentPage} totalPages={10} onPageChange={setPage} />
```

### NavigationMenu
Top-level horizontal navigation (web only).
```tsx
import { NavigationMenu } from '@vlting/ui'
<NavigationMenu.Root>
  <NavigationMenu.Item>
    <NavigationMenu.Link href="/">Home</NavigationMenu.Link>
  </NavigationMenu.Item>
  <NavigationMenu.Item>
    <NavigationMenu.Trigger>Products</NavigationMenu.Trigger>
    <NavigationMenu.Content>{productLinks}</NavigationMenu.Content>
  </NavigationMenu.Item>
</NavigationMenu.Root>
```

### Menubar
Desktop menu bar (web only).
```tsx
import { Menubar } from '@vlting/ui'
<Menubar.Root>
  <Menubar.Menu>
    <Menubar.Trigger>File</Menubar.Trigger>
    <Menubar.Content>
      <Menubar.Item>New</Menubar.Item>
      <Menubar.Item>Open</Menubar.Item>
      <Menubar.Separator />
      <Menubar.Item>Save</Menubar.Item>
    </Menubar.Content>
  </Menubar.Menu>
</Menubar.Root>
```

### Sidebar
App navigation sidebar.
```tsx
import { Sidebar } from '@vlting/ui'
<Sidebar.Root>
  <Sidebar.Group>
    <Sidebar.GroupLabel>Main</Sidebar.GroupLabel>
    <Sidebar.Menu>
      <Sidebar.MenuItem href="/" icon={RiHomeLine}>Home</Sidebar.MenuItem>
      <Sidebar.MenuItem href="/settings" icon={RiSettingsLine}>Settings</Sidebar.MenuItem>
    </Sidebar.Menu>
  </Sidebar.Group>
</Sidebar.Root>
```

### Carousel
Sliding content (web only).
```tsx
import { Carousel } from '@vlting/ui'
<Carousel.Root>
  <Carousel.Content>
    <Carousel.Item>Slide 1</Carousel.Item>
    <Carousel.Item>Slide 2</Carousel.Item>
  </Carousel.Content>
  <Carousel.Previous />
  <Carousel.Next />
</Carousel.Root>
```

### Resizable
Resizable panel layout (web only).
```tsx
import { Resizable } from '@vlting/ui'
<Resizable.PanelGroup direction="horizontal">
  <Resizable.Panel defaultSize={50}>Left</Resizable.Panel>
  <Resizable.Handle />
  <Resizable.Panel defaultSize={50}>Right</Resizable.Panel>
</Resizable.PanelGroup>
```

### ScrollArea
Custom scrollbar.
```tsx
import { ScrollArea } from '@vlting/ui'
<ScrollArea.Root style={{ height: 300 }}>
  <ScrollArea.Viewport>{longContent}</ScrollArea.Viewport>
</ScrollArea.Root>
```

### InputOTP
```tsx
import { InputOTP } from '@vlting/ui'
<InputOTP.Root maxLength={6} value={otp} onChange={setOtp}>
  <InputOTP.Group>
    <InputOTP.Slot index={0} />
    <InputOTP.Slot index={1} />
    <InputOTP.Slot index={2} />
  </InputOTP.Group>
  <InputOTP.Separator />
  <InputOTP.Group>
    <InputOTP.Slot index={3} />
    <InputOTP.Slot index={4} />
    <InputOTP.Slot index={5} />
  </InputOTP.Group>
</InputOTP.Root>
```

### Item
Generic list item with leading/trailing.
```tsx
import { Item } from '@vlting/ui'
<Item>
  <Item.Leading><Avatar src="..." /></Item.Leading>
  <Item.Content>
    <Item.Title>John Doe</Item.Title>
    <Item.Description>john@example.com</Item.Description>
  </Item.Content>
  <Item.Trailing><Badge>Admin</Badge></Item.Trailing>
</Item>
```

### ButtonGroup
```tsx
import { ButtonGroup, Button } from '@vlting/ui'
<ButtonGroup.Root>
  <Button>Left</Button>
  <Button>Center</Button>
  <Button>Right</Button>
</ButtonGroup.Root>
```

### Empty
No-content state.
```tsx
import { Empty } from '@vlting/ui'
<Empty.Root>
  <Empty.Media><RiInboxLine size={48} /></Empty.Media>
  <Empty.Title>No messages</Empty.Title>
  <Empty.Description>Start a conversation.</Empty.Description>
  <Empty.Action><Button>New Message</Button></Empty.Action>
</Empty.Root>
```

### Loader
Full-area loading state.
```tsx
import { Loader } from '@vlting/ui'
<Loader />
<Loader size="lg" label="Loading data..." />
```

### Direction / DirectionProvider
RTL/LTR support.
```tsx
import { DirectionProvider } from '@vlting/ui'
<DirectionProvider dir="rtl">{children}</DirectionProvider>
```

### Typography
```tsx
import { H1, H2, H3, P, Lead, Muted, InlineCode, List, ListItem } from '@vlting/ui'

<H1>Page Title</H1>
<H2>Section</H2>
<Lead>An introductory paragraph.</Lead>
<P>Regular paragraph text.</P>
<Muted>Secondary information.</Muted>
<InlineCode>npm install</InlineCode>
<List>
  <ListItem>First item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Second item</ListItem>
</List>
```

---

## CHARTS

Built on Victory Native. Cross-platform (web + React Native).

### Setup
```tsx
import { Chart, BarChart, ChartTooltip, ChartLegend } from '@vlting/ui'
import type { ChartConfig } from '@vlting/ui'

const config: ChartConfig = {
  revenue: { label: 'Revenue', color: '$blue9' },
  expenses: { label: 'Expenses', color: '$red9' },
}

const data = [
  { month: 'Jan', revenue: 186, expenses: 80 },
  { month: 'Feb', revenue: 305, expenses: 200 },
  { month: 'Mar', revenue: 237, expenses: 120 },
]
```

### AreaChart
```tsx
<Chart config={config} aria-label="Revenue trend">
  <AreaChart data={data} variant="default" xKey="month" dataKeys={['revenue']} />
  <ChartTooltip />
</Chart>
```
Variants: `default` | `stacked` | `percent` | `step` | `gradient` | `sparkline` | `interactive` | `multiple` | `legend` | `axes`

### BarChart
```tsx
<Chart config={config} aria-label="Revenue comparison">
  <BarChart data={data} variant="grouped" xKey="month" dataKeys={['revenue', 'expenses']} />
  <ChartTooltip />
  <ChartLegend />
</Chart>
```
Variants: `default` | `horizontal` | `stacked` | `percent` | `grouped` | `mixed` | `negative` | `interactive` | `label` | `custom`

### LineChart
```tsx
<Chart config={config} aria-label="Trend lines">
  <LineChart data={data} variant="multiple" xKey="month" dataKeys={['revenue', 'expenses']} />
  <ChartTooltip />
</Chart>
```
Variants: `default` | `multiple` | `dots` | `step` | `custom` | `label` | `linear` | `interactive` | `legend` | `sparkline`

### PieChart
```tsx
const pieData = [
  { name: 'Chrome', value: 275 },
  { name: 'Safari', value: 200 },
  { name: 'Firefox', value: 187 },
]

const pieConfig: ChartConfig = {
  Chrome: { label: 'Chrome', color: '$blue9' },
  Safari: { label: 'Safari', color: '$green9' },
  Firefox: { label: 'Firefox', color: '$orange9' },
}

<Chart config={pieConfig} aria-label="Browser share">
  <PieChart data={pieData} variant="donut" dataKey="value" nameKey="name" />
  <ChartLegend />
</Chart>
```
Variants: `default` | `donut` | `interactive` | `label` | `custom` | `stacked` | `legend` | `separator` | `half` | `nested` | `active`

### RadarChart
```tsx
<Chart config={config} aria-label="Skill comparison">
  <RadarChart data={radarData} variant="filled" dataKeys={['player1', 'player2']} />
  <ChartLegend />
</Chart>
```
Variants: `default` | `dots` | `multiple` | `lines` | `label` | `custom` | `radius` | `grid` | `circle` | `filled` | `icons` | `legend` | `stacked` | `interactive`

### RadialChart
```tsx
<Chart config={config} aria-label="Goal progress">
  <RadialChart data={radialData} variant="label" dataKey="value" />
</Chart>
```
Variants: `default` | `label` | `grid` | `text` | `shape` | `stacked`

### ChartTooltip
```tsx
<ChartTooltip variant="default" />
```
Variants: `default` | `label` | `custom` | `grid` | `minimal` | `dashed` | `indicator-dot` | `indicator-line` | `no-indicator`

### ChartLegend
```tsx
<ChartLegend layout="horizontal" />  // or "vertical"
```

### ChartDataTable
Hidden table for screen readers.
```tsx
<Chart config={config} aria-label="Data">
  <BarChart data={data} xKey="month" dataKeys={['revenue']} />
  <ChartDataTable />
</Chart>
```

---

## BLOCKS (Layer 3)

Pre-composed layouts. Each accepts a `variant` prop.

### AuthBlock
```tsx
import { AuthBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<AuthBlock
  variant="login-card"
  onSubmit={(data) => handleLogin(data)}
  socialProviders={['google', 'github']}
/>

<AuthBlock variant="signup-split" onSubmit={handleSignup} />
```
Variants: `login-card` | `login-split` | `signup-card` | `signup-split` | `signup-social`

### SidebarBlock
```tsx
import { SidebarBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<SidebarBlock
  variant="with-groups"
  items={[
    { label: 'Dashboard', href: '/', icon: RiDashboardLine },
    { label: 'Settings', href: '/settings', icon: RiSettingsLine },
  ]}
  groups={[{ label: 'Main', items: [...] }]}
/>
```
Variants: `simple` | `with-groups` | `with-icons` | `collapsible` | `with-footer` | `with-search` | `with-file-tree` | `with-nested`

### DashboardBlock
```tsx
import { DashboardBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<DashboardBlock
  variant="metrics-grid"
  metrics={[
    { title: 'Total Revenue', value: '$45,231', change: 20.1 },
    { title: 'Subscriptions', value: '2,350', change: -2.5 },
  ]}
/>
```
Variants: `metrics-grid` | `metrics-chart`

### DataTableBlock
```tsx
import { DataTableBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<DataTableBlock variant="with-toolbar" columns={columns} data={data} />
```
Variants: `default` | `with-filters` | `with-toolbar`

### SettingsBlock
```tsx
import { SettingsBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<SettingsBlock variant="profile" onSave={handleSave} />
```
Variants: `profile` | `notifications` | `appearance`

### PricingBlock
```tsx
import { PricingBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<PricingBlock
  variant="cards"
  plans={[
    { name: 'Free', price: 0, features: ['5 projects', '1GB storage'] },
    { name: 'Pro', price: 29, features: ['Unlimited', '100GB'], highlighted: true },
  ]}
/>
```
Variants: `cards` | `table` | `comparison`

### HeroBlock
```tsx
import { HeroBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<HeroBlock
  variant="centered"
  title="Build faster with @vlting/ui"
  subtitle="Cross-platform design system"
  actions={[
    { label: 'Get Started', href: '/docs', variant: 'default' },
    { label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com/vlting/ui', variant: 'outline' },
  ]}
/>
```
Variants: `centered` | `split` | `gradient` | `minimal`

### FeedBlock
```tsx
import { FeedBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<FeedBlock
  variant="timeline"
  events={[
    { title: 'Deployed v1.2', timestamp: '2h ago', icon: RiRocketLine },
    { title: 'Merged PR #42', timestamp: '5h ago', icon: RiGitMergeLine },
  ]}
/>
```
Variants: `timeline` | `notifications` | `comments`

### AppShellBlock
```tsx
import { AppShellBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<AppShellBlock
  variant="sidebar-header"
  sidebar={<SidebarBlock variant="with-groups" items={navItems} />}
  header={<Header />}
>
  {pageContent}
</AppShellBlock>
```
Variants: `sidebar-header` | `sidebar-only` | `header-only` | `dashboard`

### EmptyStateBlock
```tsx
import { EmptyStateBlock } from '@vlting/ui'

<EmptyStateBlock
  variant="with-action"
  title="No projects yet"
  description="Create your first project to get started."
  action={{ label: 'Create Project', onPress: handleCreate }}
/>
```
Variants: `simple` | `with-action` | `illustration` | `search` | `error`

---

## ICONS

3229 Remix Icons. Tree-shakeable imports.

### Direct import (recommended)
```tsx
import { RiHomeLine } from '@vlting/ui/icons'
import { RiHomeFill } from '@vlting/ui/icons'
```

### Dynamic import
```tsx
import { DynamicIcon } from '@vlting/ui'
<DynamicIcon name="ri-home-line" size={20} color="$neutral12" />
```

### Naming convention
`Ri` + PascalCase name + `Line` (outline) or `Fill` (filled)

### Common icons
- Navigation: `RiHomeLine`, `RiSearchLine`, `RiMenuLine`, `RiCloseLine`, `RiArrowLeftLine`
- Actions: `RiAddLine`, `RiDeleteBinLine`, `RiEditLine`, `RiSaveLine`, `RiShareLine`
- Status: `RiCheckLine`, `RiErrorWarningLine`, `RiInformationLine`, `RiAlertLine`
- Media: `RiImageLine`, `RiVideoLine`, `RiMusicLine`, `RiFileTextLine`
- Social: `RiGithubFill`, `RiTwitterXLine`, `RiLinkedinFill`, `RiGoogleFill`
- Communication: `RiMailLine`, `RiChat1Line`, `RiNotification3Line`, `RiPhoneLine`
- User: `RiUserLine`, `RiGroupLine`, `RiSettingsLine`, `RiLogoutBoxLine`

---

## DESIGN TOKENS

### Spacing / Size Scale
| Token | px | Common use |
|-------|----|------------|
| `$0` | 0 | None |
| `$0.25` | 1 | Hairline |
| `$0.5` | 2 | Thin border |
| `$1` | 4 | Tiny gap |
| `$1.5` | 6 | Small padding |
| `$2` | 8 | Standard small gap |
| `$2.5` | 10 | Medium-small |
| `$3` | 12 | Component padding |
| `$3.5` | 14 | Medium |
| `$4` | 16 | Standard gap |
| `$5` | 20 | Medium gap |
| `$6` | 24 | Section gap |
| `$7` | 28 | Large padding |
| `$8` | 32 | Large gap |
| `$10` | 40 | XL gap |
| `$12` | 48 | XXL gap |
| `$16` | 64 | Max gap |

### Radius Scale
| Token | px |
|-------|----|
| `$0` | 0 |
| `$1` | 2 |
| `$2` | 4 |
| `$3` | 6 |
| `$4` | 8 |
| `$5` | 10 |
| `$6` | 12 |
| `$8` | 16 |
| `$10` | 20 |
| `$12` | 24 |
| `$full` | 9999 |

### Semantic Colors
| Token | Use |
|-------|-----|
| `$colorSubtitle` | Secondary text |
| `$placeholderColor` | Input placeholder |
| `$outlineColor` | Focus outline |
| `$shadowColor` | Box shadows |
| `$color1` – `$color12` | Direct palette access |

### Z-Index Scale
| Token | Value | Use |
|-------|-------|-----|
| `$0` | 0 | Base |
| `$1` | 100 | Sticky |
| `$2` | 200 | Header |
| `$3` | 300 | Dropdown |
| `$4` | 400 | Overlay |
| `$5` | 500 | Modal |
| `$6` | 600 | Popover |
| `$7` | 700 | Tooltip |
| `$8` | 10000 | Max |

### Media Queries / Breakpoints
| Key | px | Use |
|-----|-----|-----|
| `$xxs` | 0 | Mobile portrait |
| `$xs` | 400 | Mobile landscape |
| `$sm` | 640 | Small tablet |
| `$md` | 768 | Tablet |
| `$lg` | 1024 | Desktop |
| `$xl` | 1280 | Large desktop |
| `$xxl` | 1536 | Extra large |

Greater-than variants: `$gtXxs`, `$gtXs`, `$gtSm`, `$gtMd`, `$gtLg`, `$gtXl`

---

## ANTI-PATTERNS

### 1. Hardcoded visual values
```tsx
// BAD
<Box backgroundColor="#f5f5f5" padding={16} borderRadius={8}>
<Text color="gray" fontSize={14}>

// GOOD
<Box backgroundColor="$min" padding="$4" borderRadius="$4">
<Text color="$colorSubtitle" fontSize="$3">
```

### 2. Wrong component for the job
```tsx
// BAD: Button for navigation
<Button onPress={() => router.push('/about')}>About</Button>
// GOOD: Link element
<a href="/about">About</a>

// BAD: Dialog for yes/no
<Dialog.Root>...confirm...</Dialog.Root>
// GOOD: AlertDialog
<AlertDialog.Root>...confirm...</AlertDialog.Root>

// BAD: Select for 2 options
<Select.Root>...yes/no...</Select.Root>
// GOOD: RadioGroup or Switch
<RadioGroup.Root>...</RadioGroup.Root>
```

### 3. Missing labels
```tsx
// BAD
<Input />
<Switch />

// GOOD
<Field.Root>
  <Field.Label>Email</Field.Label>
  <Field.Control><Input /></Field.Control>
</Field.Root>

<HStack gap="$2" alignItems="center">
  <Label htmlFor="dark-mode">Dark mode</Label>
  <Switch id="dark-mode" />
</HStack>
```

### 4. Web-only APIs in cross-platform code
```tsx
// BAD
<Box onClick={handler}>
<Input onChange={handler}>

// GOOD
<Box onPress={handler}>
<Input onChangeText={handler}>
```

### 5. Reinventing existing components
```tsx
// BAD: Custom card wrapper
const MyCard = styled(YStack, { padding: '$4', borderRadius: '$4', borderWidth: 1 })

// GOOD: Use Card
<Card><Card.Content>{children}</Card.Content></Card>
```

### 6. Bare children in compound components
```tsx
// BAD
<Dialog.Root>
  <button>Open</button>
  <div>Content</div>
</Dialog.Root>

// GOOD
<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger><Button>Open</Button></Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Title>Title</Dialog.Title>
    {content}
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>
```

### 7. Brand-specific colors
```tsx
// BAD: Only works with one brand
<Badge backgroundColor="$blue9">New</Badge>

// GOOD: Semantic — works with all brands
<Badge variant="default" tone="primary">New</Badge>
```

---

## DECISION TREES

### "How should I structure this page?"
1. Full app with sidebar? → `AppShellBlock`
2. Landing page? → `HeroBlock` + content sections
3. Settings page? → `SettingsBlock`
4. Dashboard? → `DashboardBlock`
5. Auth flow? → `AuthBlock`
6. Custom? → `VStack` + components

### "How should I show this list?"
1. Tabular data with sorting? → `DataTable`
2. Static table? → `Table`
3. Rich items with icons/avatars? → `Item` in a `VStack`
4. Simple text list? → `List` + `ListItem`
5. Activity feed? → `FeedBlock`

### "How should I handle this form?"
1. Full form with validation? → `Form.Root` + `Form.Field` + submit
2. Individual labeled inputs? → `Field.Root` + `Field.Label` + `Field.Control`
3. Date selection? → `DatePicker` / `DateRangePicker`
4. Multi-select? → `Checkbox` group
5. Single select (few)? → `RadioGroup`
6. Single select (many)? → `Select` or `Combobox`

### "How should I show this notification?"
1. Temporary, auto-dismiss? → `toast()`
2. Permanent inline? → `Alert`
3. Status badge? → `Badge`
4. Loading? → `Loader` or `Spinner`
5. No content? → `Empty`

---

## UTILITIES

```tsx
import { cn, mergeRefs, composeEventHandlers, FontLoader } from '@vlting/ui'

// cn — conditional class names
cn('base', active && 'active', error && 'error')

// mergeRefs — combine refs
<Input ref={mergeRefs(localRef, forwardedRef)} />

// composeEventHandlers — chain handlers
<Button onPress={composeEventHandlers(props.onPress, handler)} />

// FontLoader — load Google Fonts on web
<FontLoader config={config} />
```

## HOOKS

```tsx
import {
  useControllableState,   // Controlled/uncontrolled pattern
  useFocusTrap,            // Trap focus in container
  useKeyboardNavigation,   // Arrow/tab navigation
} from '@vlting/ui'

// useControllableState
const [value, setValue] = useControllableState({
  prop: controlledValue,
  defaultProp: 'default',
  onChange: onValueChange,
})
```

---

## MIGRATION FROM SHADCN

### Key differences
1. **No className** — use Tamagui style props or component variants
2. **No asChild** — wrap children directly
3. **onPress not onClick** — cross-platform event names
4. **onChangeText not onChange** — Input event handler
5. **Token values** — `padding="$4"` not `className="p-4"`
6. **Compound components** — `Card.Header` not `CardHeader`

### Quick mapping
| shadcn | @vlting/ui |
|--------|-----------|
| `className="p-4"` | `padding="$4"` |
| `className="text-sm"` | `fontSize="$2"` |
| `className="rounded-lg"` | `borderRadius="$6"` |
| `className="bg-muted"` | `backgroundColor="$min"` |
| `className="text-muted-foreground"` | `color="$colorSubtitle"` |
| `onClick` | `onPress` |
| `onChange` | `onChangeText` (Input) |
| `asChild` | Wrap children directly |
| `<CardHeader>` | `<Card.Header>` |
| `<DialogTrigger>` | `<Dialog.Trigger>` |

Full API mappings: `api-mappings.json` in the repo root.
